case_title: TAHIR, HENDRY et al vs. VERA, SILVESTRE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAHIR, HENDRY TAHIR, LIANA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-19-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-26-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

ASSIGNED TO D218, DEFAULT PROVEUP HEARING. COMMISSIONER RALPH FLAGEOLLET. CLERK:BHING. MNORMAN, CSR. WIT S/E. DOC EVID INTRO AND WITHDRAWN. JUDGMENT FOR PLTFF TAHIR AND AGAINST DFDNT DENNIS AS FOLLOWS: POSSESSION OF PREMISES, 571 SHOTWELL ST, FORFEITURE OF LEASE; $829.76 PAST DUE RENT, $756.86 INTEREST AND REASONABEL COSTS TO BE SUBMITTED BY COUNSEL.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DENNIS, KEITH
